text:
star, astronomical object consisting of a luminous spheroid of plasma held together by its own gravity, also known as the stars, stars, celestial stars, celestial star. Attributes include: 
- Unicode character: "⭐"
- Commons category: "Stars"
- subclass of: "astronomical object",
 "fusor",
 "light source"
- part of: "star system"
- Commons gallery: "Star"
- described by source: "Brockhaus and Efron Encyclopedic Dictionary",
 "The Nuttall Encyclopædia (subject named as: Stars, The)",
 "Encyclopædia Britannica 11th edition",
 "Granat Encyclopedic Dictionary"
- has characteristic: "stellar magnetic field",
 "apparent magnitude"
- properties for this type: "type of variable star",
 "mass",
 "radius",
 "temperature",
 "constellation",
 "declination component of proper motion",
 "right ascension component of proper motion",
 "stellar rotational velocity",
 "spectral class",
 "metallicity",
 "ARICNS"
- on focus list of Wikimedia project: "Wikipedia:List of articles all languages should have"
- studied by: "astronomy"
- location: "universe"
- has part(s): "plasma"
- model item: "UY Scuti (applies to use with property: instance of)",
 "Pistol Star (applies to use with property: instance of)",
 "giant star (applies to use with property: subclass of)"
- next lower rank: "planet"
- next higher rank: "black hole"
- child astronomical body: "artificial satellite"
- made from material: "plasma"
